message:
feat(freeze): Add put_var opcodes Zig support

Convert put_var, put_var_init, and put_var_strict opcodes to Zig output.
These opcodes set global variable values.

Stack effect: [value] -> [] (pops 1)

Implementation:
- Pops value from stack
- Gets global object
- Sets property on global with variable name
- Frees global object reference (val is consumed by SetPropertyStr)
- Handles empty/out-of-bounds atoms by just freeing the value
- In Zig: uses block expression for POP
- In C: uses POP() macro
